items.title: Living alone? The 'singles tax' that costs $10K a year
items.description: Living alone costs Americans over $10,000 extra per year in what experts call a "singles tax," as apartment rents surge nationwide, new data reveals.

items.title: Gas prices fall in January, giving Americans a break at the pump
items.description: Gas prices dropped 7.5% over the past year, bringing welcome relief to American consumers as inflation data shows energy costs declining nationwide.

items.title: SpaceX launches crew to International Space Station after prior team's medical evacuation
items.description: SpaceX and NASA launched a new crew to the International Space Station on Friday, around one month after a previous crew had to be brought home early.

items.title: Inflation eased slightly in January but remained well above the Fed's target

items.title: Mortgage rates edge lower, hover near 6%
items.description: The average rate on a 30-year fixed mortgage slipped this week to 6.09%, according to the latest Freddie Mac data released Thursday. That is down from...
